race.comment: CAVARETTA (9) resumed over a sprint at Ipswich and defied the market, beaten just 1.4L. The step up to the mile suits and she has more to give. Mallyon will jump her out from an inside barrier and she should go close. DRAGON SONG (10) brings placings from Dalby and Warwick. She races well here first-up and is locally trained. Can get into the finish with average luck. GAVIN (1) needed it first-up and has been freshened 46 days. Likes this trip and has placed 2/3 second-up. He can show a lot more today. SKORPIOS ISLE (3) is a better chance than the three duck eggs suggest. Suited today and finally draws an inside barrier. His form last preparation stacks up.
